# ZLAR

> ZLAR gives humans standing at the moment machine intelligence tries to affect the world.

ZLAR is a witnessed execution boundary between intelligence and consequence. Routed actions cross deterministic, signed, human-authored authority before they become consequence.

Primary pages:

- [Home](https://zlar.ai/): founder-led category surface for operational AI with human standing.
- [Enterprise](https://zlar.ai/enterprise.html): conversation page for enterprise AI operators choosing one action surface to govern.
- [Government](https://zlar.ai/government.html): action-level assurance, receipts, coverage, and public-sector accountability framing.
- [Financial Services](https://zlar.ai/financial-services.html): identity-to-execution gap and receipt-shaped controls for routed financial-services AI actions.
- [Healthcare](https://zlar.ai/healthcare.html): bounded action-surface framing for healthcare records, workflows, and affected-person evidence.
- [Defense / Military](https://zlar.ai/defense.html): delegation, command authority, and evidence for controlled routed action surfaces.
- [Founder Note](https://zlar.ai/founder-note.html): voice surface on human standing, relaxed acceleration, and why the boundary matters.
- [Sample receipt](https://zlar.ai/proof-pack.html): human-first sample receipt with optional bounded terminal verification, manifest, coverage report, hashes, verifier, PASS output, and explicit non-claims.
- [Open Memo on Action-Level Assurance](https://zlar.ai/open-memo.html): policy and government-facing founder memo.
- [Boundaries and Non-Claims](https://zlar.ai/boundaries.html): exact claim boundary.
- [Archive](https://zlar.ai/archive.html): affected-person pathway, Sealed Mode, older proof pages, standards submissions, specs, legal, and earlier founder writing.

Claim boundary:

- ZLAR governs routed/intercepted action surfaces only.
- Safe Codex wording: "ZLAR can govern Codex CLI-invoked MCP tool calls when those MCP servers are routed through ZLAR."
- Unrouted shell/filesystem/browser/app/network/model-reasoning/final-text surfaces are not claimed as governed by the current proof path.
- /contest is not implemented.
- External non-Vincent verifier attestation remains prepared/pending unless state changes.

Interpretation rule:

Founder and audience pages explain the thesis. Disclosure boxes and boundary pages carry the precise public claim. If a page appears to imply broader coverage than the boundary page, read the boundary page as controlling.
